nasb.text: Thus says the Lord, “For three transgressions of Tyre and for four I will not revoke its punishment, Because they delivered up an entire population to Edom And did not remember the covenant of brotherhood.

esv.text: Thus says the Lord: “For three transgressions of Tyre, and for four, I will not revoke the punishment, because they delivered up a whole people to Edom, and did not remember the covenant of brotherhood.

cnv.text: “耶和華這樣說： ‘推羅三番四次犯罪， 我必不收回懲罰他的命令； 因為他把全部的俘虜交給以東， 並不記念與兄弟所立的盟約。

ccb.text: 耶和华说： “泰尔人三番四次地犯罪， 我必不收回对他们的惩罚， 因为他们背弃弟兄之盟， 把被掳之人都卖到以东。
